lanes.name: Quote-to-contract approvals
lanes.narrative: Approval handoffs and exception queues are delaying high-intent commercial changes.
lanes.nextAction: Split contract blockers by owner, attach evidence packets, and route stale approvals to a named escalation lane.

lanes.name: Vendor onboarding controls
lanes.narrative: Evidence gaps and late approvals make vendor readiness difficult to defend.
lanes.nextAction: Require proof attachments before approval tasks can close and isolate stale vendor packets.

lanes.name: Incident remediation intake
lanes.narrative: Remediation packets are visible but still age when ownership is unclear.
lanes.nextAction: Bind each remediation task to a single owner and expose late packets in the weekly reliability review.

lanes.name: Customer entitlement changes
lanes.narrative: Entitlement changes are mostly controlled but need clearer exception aging.
lanes.nextAction: Publish aged entitlement exceptions with account impact and owner signoff.

lanes.name: Policy exception review
lanes.narrative: Policy exceptions are readable and currently inside tolerance.
lanes.nextAction: Keep evidence completeness above 80 percent and close late exceptions before quarterly review.
